title: papaver tenellum
intro: Papaver tenellum, also known as the small poppy or small meadow poppy, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the poppy family (Papaveraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to induce a sedative and antispasmodic effect. The health benefits of Papaver tenellum include relief from insomnia, anxiety, and muscle spasms, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and pain. Papaver tenellum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
